title: A2A Agents Config
description: Agent role presets and optional named crews. agents.default.json is committed; an optional gitignored agents.json fully replaces it when present.

agents.description: A map of role name to role preset.

backend.description: Which inference backend handles this role.

description.description: One-sentence summary shown to peer agents in list_agents.

systemPrompt.description: System prompt prepended to every conversation.

skills.description: Capabilities surfaced via the Agent Card.

toolCapable.description: Set true if the model supports function calling. Claude is always true; Ollama models vary.

webSearch.description: Expose a web_search tool to this agent. claude backend: uses Anthropic's server-side web_search. ollama backend: uses Ollama's hosted search API (requires toolCapable:true and OLLAMA_API_KEY in the env, else silently absent). Ignored by claude-code, which has its own web tools.

crews.description: Named sets of agents to launch together, with optional per-agent overrides. A "default" crew is required and used when no --crew or --agents flag is passed.

agents.description: Ordered list of role names (keys from the top-level agents map) to include in this crew.

agentOverrides.description: Per-role overrides applied on top of the base role preset. Each key must match a role name in the agents array.

backend.description: Which inference backend handles this role.

description.description: One-sentence summary shown to peer agents in list_agents.

systemPrompt.description: System prompt prepended to every conversation.

skills.description: Capabilities surfaced via the Agent Card.

toolCapable.description: Set true if the model supports function calling.

webSearch.description: Expose a web_search tool to this agent.
